# Dean Keesey — Software Engineer & Technical Leader

> Full-stack software engineer specializing in AI-integrated applications, cloud infrastructure, and developer tooling. Based in Oakland, CA with experience leading engineering teams and building production systems at scale.

## Professional Information

- **Name**: Dean Keesey
- **Role**: Software Engineer / Technical Leader
- **Location**: Oakland, CA
- **Website**: https://deankeesey.com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/dkeesey
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/deankeesey

## Technical Expertise

- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Astro, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, BigQuery
- **Infrastructure**: Cloudflare Workers/Pages, AWS, Docker, CI/CD
- **AI/ML**: Claude API, OpenAI, LangChain, prompt engineering, AI agent architecture
- **Analytics**: GA4, Google Search Console, Microsoft Clarity, data pipelines
